synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28015 Oracle Linux 9 leapp-repository bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28015
description:
[0.22.0-1.0.7]
- Correctly process drgn package [Orabug: 38698236]
- Correctly process ipa-server update [Orabug: 38096687]
- Correctly process python3.12-typing-extensions [Orabug: 38671893]
- Restore and fix ISO upgrade inhibitor for special cases [Orabug: 38489510]
- Support additional migrations [Orabug: 38665636], [Orabug: 38662946]
- Support 9.7 and 10.1 [Orabug: 38544272], [Orabug: 38640771], [Orabug: 38452658]
- Remove unified-monitoring-agent on upgrade [Orabug: 38603872]
- Drop redundant firmware inhibitor [Orabug: 38636586]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28015

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28015.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-0.22.0-1.0.7.el9.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-deps-0.22.0-1.0.7.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-0.22.0-1.0.7.el9.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el9toel10-deps-0.22.0-1.0.7.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/leapp-repository-0.22.0-1.0.7.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.22.0-1.0.7]
- Correctly process drgn package [Orabug: 38698236]
- Correctly process ipa-server update [Orabug: 38096687]
- Correctly process python3.12-typing-extensions [Orabug: 38671893]
- Restore and fix ISO upgrade inhibitor for special cases [Orabug: 38489510]
- Support additional migrations [Orabug: 38665636], [Orabug: 38662946]
- Support 9.7 and 10.1 [Orabug: 38544272], [Orabug: 38640771], [Orabug: 38452658]
- Remove unified-monitoring-agent on upgrade [Orabug: 38603872]
- Drop redundant firmware inhibitor [Orabug: 38636586]
